name: King's Gambit Declined: Classical Variation as Black
description: A Black repertoire for the King's Gambit Declined: Classical Variation, drilled one position at a time: every card is a position with exactly one book move to find. Built from 3,000,000 rated games (Lichess database 2026-06, ratings 1600-2200): opponent replies branch by how often they are actually played, covering the most common 90% at each turn, so frequent lines run deep and rare sidelines stay shallow. 7 positions.

fields.prompt: You are Black in the King's Gambit Declined: Classical Variation. What is the book move?
fields.extra: 1. e4 **e5** [White plays e4 here 59% of the time]
